content:
schema_version: 1

header:
  author: <AUTHOR>
  copyright_holder: <COPYRIGHT_HOLDER>
  license: Apache-2.0

# ============================================================
# SOC
# ============================================================
soc:
  name: <DESIGN_NAME>
  top_module: <DESIGN_NAME>_compute_ss
  # >> cpu_type options (pick one):
  # >>   rv32im_core_3stage     — basic 3-stage RV32IM
  # >>   rv32im_debug_top       — RV32IM with debug
  # >>   hazard3_1port_jtag     — Hazard3, 1 port, JTAG
  # >>   hazard3_2port_jtag     — Hazard3, 2 ports, JTAG (recommended for Hazard3)
  # >>   hazard3_1port_swd      — Hazard3, 1 port, SWD
  # >>   hazard3_2port_swd      — Hazard3, 2 ports, SWD
  cpu_type: <CPU_TYPE>
  # >> package name must exactly match package.name below
  package: <PACKAGE_NAME>
  clock_hz: <CLOCK_HZ>
  reset_active_low: true
  # >> interrupt_policy options:
  # >>   nc_pic             — use nc_pic peripheral (required for rv32im)
  # >>   hazard3_internal   — built-in PLIC (required for hazard3_*, forbids nc_pic peripheral)
  interrupt_policy: <INTERRUPT_POLICY>

# ============================================================
# MEMORY
# ============================================================
memory:
  xip:
    enabled: true
    base_addr: 0x00000000
    size_bytes: 0x00400000    # 4MB
    module: nc_xip
  sram:
    base_addr: 0x20000000
    # >> size_bytes must be a power of 2
    # >> common values: 0x2000 (8KB), 0x4000 (16KB), 0x8000 (32KB), 0x10000 (64KB)
    size_bytes: <SRAM_SIZE_BYTES>
    # >> ALWAYS use nc_ahb_to_sram — never use register-based memory
    module: nc_ahb_to_sram
    interface: ahb_lite
    model: cf
    sim_model: cf

# ============================================================
# FABRIC
# ============================================================
fabric:
  ahb:
    reserved_region_value: 0xBADB00B5
    # >> set to true if user requests DMA; must add nc_dmac peripheral entry below
    with_dmac: false
    dmac_priority: true
  apb_auto:
    base_addr_start: 0x40000000
    slot_size: 0x1000
    slots_per_bus: 16
    min_buses: 1
    bus_stride: 0x00010000
    name_prefix: apb
  irq_auto:
    start: 0
  dma_auto:
    start: 0
  passthrough:
    clk_rst_pwr: true
    io_cfg_ss: true

# ============================================================
# PACKAGE  (top-level — not nested under soc)
# ============================================================
# >> package.name must match soc.package above
# >> io_pads: signal pads (GPIO, clk, reset, QSPI, etc.)
# >> power_pins: VDD/VSS/VDDIO/VSSIO pads
# >> Package budgets (approximate):
# >>   QFN32:  io_pads: 16, power_pins: 6
# >>   QFN48:  io_pads: 24, power_pins: 8
# >>   LQFP64: io_pads: 32, power_pins: 8
# >> gpio_ports: list of GPIO port groups exposed through this package
# >>   Each nc_gpio peripheral instance provides 16 pins (gpioa, gpiob, etc.)
# >>   width: how many pins from that port are in the package (typically 8 or 16)
package:
  name: <PACKAGE_NAME>
  io_pads: <IO_PADS>
  power_pins: <POWER_PINS>
  gpio_ports:
    - name: gpioa
      width: 8
      reset_oe: input
    # >> Uncomment additional ports as needed:
    # - name: gpiob
    #   width: 8
    #   reset_oe: input
    # - name: gpioc
    #   width: 8
    #   reset_oe: input

# ============================================================
# PERIPHERALS
# ============================================================
# >> Required: each entry needs type, module, count
# >> Delete entries not needed; uncomment entries that are needed
# >> For rv32im: include nc_pic and nc_systick
# >> For hazard3: remove nc_pic (built-in PLIC), keep nc_systick
peripherals:

  # --- Core GPIO (always include at least 1) ---
  - type: gpio
    module: nc_gpio
    count: <GPIO_COUNT>
    instance_prefix: gpio

  # --- UART ---
  - type: uart
    module: nc_uart
    count: <UART_COUNT>
    instance_prefix: uart

  # --- Timer ---
  - type: tmr
    module: nc_tmr
    count: <TMR_COUNT>
    instance_prefix: tmr

  # --- Optional peripherals (uncomment as needed) ---

  # - type: spi
  #   module: nc_spi
  #   count: 1
  #   instance_prefix: spi

  # - type: i2c
  #   module: nc_i2c
  #   count: 1
  #   instance_prefix: i2c

  # - type: pwm
  #   module: nc_pwm
  #   count: 1
  #   instance_prefix: pwm

  # - type: aes
  #   module: nc_aes
  #   count: 1

  # - type: sha256
  #   module: nc_sha256
  #   count: 1

  # - type: crc
  #   module: nc_crc
  #   count: 1

  # - type: wwdt
  #   module: nc_wwdt
  #   count: 1

  # - type: rtc
  #   module: nc_rtc
  #   count: 1

  # --- DMAC: only if fabric.ahb.with_dmac: true ---
  # - type: dmac
  #   module: nc_dmac
  #   count: 1

  # --- System (rv32im only — remove for hazard3) ---
  - type: systick
    module: nc_systick
    count: 1

  # >> Remove nc_pic if using hazard3 (interrupt_policy: hazard3_internal)
  - type: pic
    module: nc_pic
    count: 1
    irq_capacity: 32

# ============================================================
# GENERATION
# ============================================================
generation:
  emit_padframe_handoff: true
  emit_fw_pack: true
  emit_smoke: true
  emit_directed_tests: true
  emit_datasheet: true
  emit_csv: true
  emit_manifest: true
  emit_filelist: true
  emit_reg_spec: true
  smoke_sequence_format: verilog_include_calls
  verilog_standard: verilog-2005
  include_comments: true
  build_fw_smoke: true
  fw_signature_addr: 0x20000000
